homeSubtitle: Track contributions, expenses, and fair shares for your jamaat trips.
noJamaats: No jamaats yet. Create one to get started.
noMembers: Add members to split expenses fairly.
poolModelHint: Contributions are pooled in one place. Expenses are paid from that pool. “Paid by” only records who handed out the money — it does not add to someone’s personal balance.
poolSettlementHint: Whoever is holding all collected cash should pay or collect these amounts so each person’s contribution matches their fair share of spending.
noPoolMoves: No money to move — everyone’s contribution matches their fair share.
receiveFromHolder: {{name}} should receive {{amount}} from the person holding the pooled money
payToHolder: {{name}} should pay {{amount}} to the person holding the pooled money
closureIntro: Final summary for closing this jamaat’s accounts.
surplusExplain: The amounts below split the leftover cash by each member’s share of total contributions — use this when handing money back.
deficitExplain: The group spent more than was collected. The extra share each person owes is split by their fair share of total expenses.
surplusRefundLine: Share of leftover cash to return: {{amount}}
deficitShareLine: Extra share of shortfall to pay: {{amount}}
restoreConfirm: This will replace all data. Continue?
invalidJamaatRange: End date must be on or after start date.
memberNoOverlap: Member dates must overlap the jamaat period.
confirmDeleteJamaat: Delete this jamaat and all members and expenses?
confirmDeleteMember: Remove this member? You must delete or reassign their paid expenses first if any exist.
cannotDeleteMember: This member has expenses recorded as payer. Edit or delete those expenses first.
datesAutoExpandHint: Trip dates widen automatically to include all expense and member dates (only expands). Use Edit jamaat if you need to shorten the range.
networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
shareInviteMessage: Join our jamaat in Tabligh Expenses with this invite code:
firebaseNotConfigured: Cloud sync is not set up. Add Firebase keys in app config.
firebaseCreateFailed: Could not create cloud jamaat. It was saved on this device only.
memberNotSynced: This member is not synced to the cloud yet. Wait for sync or pick another payer.
cloudSyncJoinHintShort: Tip: Join with a code needs Firebase keys in app.json (see Settings → Cloud & invites).
cloudSyncJoinHint: Cloud is not configured. Add firebaseApiKey, firebaseProjectId, and firebaseAppId under expo.extra in app.json, then restart the app. You can still fill the form below to test the UI; Join will fail until Firebase is set up.
noInviteCodeHint: No code yet. This jamaat exists only on this device, or Firebase is not configured. After Firebase is set up, create a new jamaat to get a JAM- invite code.
cloudSyncSettingsBody: Join Jamaat and invite codes use Firebase Firestore. In app.json under expo.extra, set firebaseApiKey, firebaseProjectId, and firebaseAppId (and optional fields) from Firebase Console → Project settings → Your apps → Web app. Restart Expo after saving.
cloudSyncStatusOn: Status: Firebase keys detected (cloud features enabled).
cloudSyncStatusOff: Status: not configured — add keys to app.json to enable Join and codes.
